description: I/O contracts for all dbSherpa node types. All datasets are pandas DataFrames passed by name through the shared RunContext.

agent.description: Call Gemini with rows + prompt (requires GEMINI_API_KEY in backend/.env).

config_schema.maxRows: Cap rows for per-row AI calls. Keep low (≤10) for snappy demos.
config_schema.emitPublishRow: Replace output rows with one Confluence-ready {title, body_markdown} row.

params.name: maxRows
params.description: Cap rows for per-row AI calls. Keep low (≤10) for snappy demos.

params.name: emitPublishRow
params.description: Replace output rows with one Confluence-ready {title, body_markdown} row.

api_trigger.description: Trigger via HTTP webhook (returns the request payload).

code.description: Run sandboxed Starlark on the incoming rows. Assign the transformed table to `output` (preferred) or `result`. No imports, while loops, or filesystem/network access — safe for AI-generated logic.

inputs.rows: Table rows from the upstream node.

outputs.rows: Transformed rows produced by your Starlark script.

config_schema.code_summary: Plain-language explanation of what the Starlark script does (for non-technical readers). Usually filled by the AI when code is generated.

constraints: Do not use import, while, or recursion in Starlark.
Prefer assigning `output`; `result` is accepted for older workflows.
Upstream rows are available as `input_data["rows"]` and as `rows`.

inputs.name: rows
inputs.description: Table rows from the upstream node.

outputs.name: rows
outputs.description: Transformed rows produced by your Starlark script.

params.name: code_summary
params.description: Plain-language explanation of what the Starlark script does (for non-technical readers). Usually filled by the AI when code is generated.

condition.description: Branch rows into true / false outputs by an expression.

confluence_mcp.description: Call Confluence MCP bridge tools — search pages, extract action items, publish reports.

config_schema.serverUrl: Optional bridge URL override (default http://127.0.0.1:8765 or MCP_SERVER_URL).
config_schema.pageTitle: Confluence page title override (defaults to generated name).
config_schema.params: Tool arguments (JSON). Upstream rows are passed as params.data automatically.

params.name: serverUrl
params.description: Optional bridge URL override (default http://127.0.0.1:8765 or MCP_SERVER_URL).

params.name: pageTitle
params.description: Confluence page title override (defaults to generated name).

params.name: params
params.description: Tool arguments (JSON). Upstream rows are passed as params.data automatically.

csv_extract.description: Load rows from an Oracle-backed dataset (alias for table extract).

csv_output.description: Serialize rows to a CSV string.

db_query.description: Run a SELECT against an Oracle-backed dataset.

deduplicate.description: Remove duplicate rows by a key column.

evaluator.description: Evaluate rows against criteria; reports pass / fail rate.

excel_output.description: Write multi-tab Excel from each upstream dataset.

filter.description: Filter rows by an expression (row.column accessible).

function.description: Run Python code with access to input and previous output.

github.description: GitHub API actions. Requires GITHUB_TOKEN and GITHUB_REPO (or config.repo).

github_mcp.description: Call GitHub MCP bridge tools — implement fixes, open PRs linked to Jira issues.

config_schema.serverUrl: Optional bridge URL override (default http://127.0.0.1:8765 or MCP_SERVER_URL).
config_schema.params: Tool arguments (JSON). Upstream rows are passed as params.data automatically.

params.name: serverUrl
params.description: Optional bridge URL override (default http://127.0.0.1:8765 or MCP_SERVER_URL).

params.name: params
params.description: Tool arguments (JSON). Upstream rows are passed as params.data automatically.

gmail.description: Send email via Gmail. Requires GMAIL_CLIENT_SECRET in backend/.env.

http.description: Fetch data from any HTTP URL.

jira_mcp.description: Call Jira MCP bridge tools — create issues, list tickets, epics from Confluence.

config_schema.serverUrl: Optional bridge URL override (default http://127.0.0.1:8765 or MCP_SERVER_URL).
config_schema.params: Tool arguments (JSON). Upstream rows are passed as params.data automatically.

params.name: serverUrl
params.description: Optional bridge URL override (default http://127.0.0.1:8765 or MCP_SERVER_URL).

params.name: params
params.description: Tool arguments (JSON). Upstream rows are passed as params.data automatically.

join.description: Join two upstream datasets on key columns.

loop.description: Iterate over rows (pass-through; surfaces iteration metadata).

map_transform.description: Rename columns or compute new ones from row expressions.

mcp.description: Legacy combined MCP node — use jira_mcp, confluence_mcp, or github_mcp for new workflows.

config_schema.serverUrl: Optional bridge URL override (default http://127.0.0.1:8765 or MCP_SERVER_URL).
config_schema.pageTitle: Confluence page title override (defaults to generated name).
config_schema.tool: Tool to invoke on the selected integration.
config_schema.params: Tool arguments (JSON). Upstream rows are passed as params.data automatically.

params.name: serverUrl
params.description: Optional bridge URL override (default http://127.0.0.1:8765 or MCP_SERVER_URL).

params.name: pageTitle
params.description: Confluence page title override (defaults to generated name).

params.name: tool
params.description: Tool to invoke on the selected integration.

params.name: params
params.description: Tool arguments (JSON). Upstream rows are passed as params.data automatically.

note.description: Canvas comment / annotation. Pass-through with text.

notion.description: Read or write to a Notion database (requires NOTION_API_KEY).

outlook.description: Prepare or send an Outlook email via Microsoft Graph. Stubbed until Graph credentials are configured.

pause.description: Wait for a number of milliseconds before continuing.

pdf_extract.description: Extract text from a PDF (mock content by default).

router.description: Route rows to labelled branches by an expression returning a label.

select_columns.description: Pick a specific subset of columns.

slack.description: Send a Slack message via Bot Token (chat.postMessage) or incoming webhook.

teams.description: Post a Microsoft Teams channel message via incoming webhook. Graph mode is planned.

telegram.description: Send a Telegram message via Bot API (sendMessage).
